title: Aquarius Knot Wrap
description: Wrap a birthday gift for your Aquarius friend with this reusable Knot Wrap featuring an exclusive zodiac sign.

images.alt: Aquarius. A square, fabric knot wrap. There is a purple border with the word "Aquarius" in orange on each side. The central image shows a deep-blue, starry background. A pink, striped vase spills bright teal and aqua-marine blue splashes.
The image shows a blurred pink background scattered with sparkles. The Aquarius-themed knot wrap is floating with the design facing the camera showing the shimmering, silky texture of the fabric.

The image shows a model in a sapphire-blue dress on a blurred pink background scattered with sparkles. They have fashioned the Aquarius-themed fabric knot wrap into a handled gift bag they are holding over their shoulder.
The image shows a super close-up image of the Aquarius-themed knot wrap. The shot is focused on the texture of the material and the vibrancy of the pink and blue colours included.
